description: Style NoteYou'll look all dressed up when you go out in this top from scullers for her. Team this with leggings and silver stilettoes for an easy breezy look.Product DetailsNavy blue top, has a round neck, yoke at the neck which is elasticated and smocked, short sleeves and pin tucks on the front and at the backMaterial and Care100% viscoseMachine/hand wash dark colours separately in cold water using mild detergentDo not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeDo not iron on printSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 32") is wearing a size M
